subject: docs(claude): merge shared conventions from glow-props CLAUDE.md
body:
Syncs see-veo CLAUDE.md with the external glow-props CLAUDE.md to
maintain consistent AI workflow conventions across projects.

Added sections: Documentation management (SESSION_NOTES, TODO, HISTORY,
USER_ACTIONS, AI_MISTAKES), AI Notes, Triggers (10 analysis commands
with aliases and sweep behavior), Suggested Implementations (PWA system,
icon generation, PDF download, timer leak fixes).

Enhanced sections: Cleanup (KEEP marker, console.debug), Quality Checks
(specific XSS/performance items), Prohibitions (3 new rules).

Tags: documentation, conventions, sync
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: documentation
Semver: patch
title: merge shared conventions from glow-props CLAUDE.md
